title: Trustpilot Reviews Scraper
description: Provide one or more company domains (e.g. "netflix.com") or full Trustpilot review URLs and configure how many reviews to extract.

companyNames.title: Company Domains / Names
companyNames.description: List of company domains or names to scrape, e.g. "netflix.com", "spotify.com". The scraper builds the Trustpilot URL automatically.

companyUrls.title: Trustpilot Company URLs
companyUrls.description: List of full Trustpilot company page URLs, e.g. "https://www.trustpilot.com/review/netflix.com".

maxReviewsPerCompany.title: Max Reviews Per Company
maxReviewsPerCompany.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape per company. Set to 0 to scrape all available reviews.

sortBy.title: Sort Reviews By
sortBy.description: How to order reviews on each company page.

filterByRating.title: Filter By Star Rating
filterByRating.description: Only scrape reviews with this star rating. Choose "All Ratings" for no filter.

verifiedOnly.title: Verified Reviews Only
verifiedOnly.description: If enabled, only verified reviews are saved to the dataset.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Trustpilot uses anti-bot protection, so residential proxies are strongly recommended for reliable results.
